summary: Iteration 2 backend testing complete. All 23/23 pytest tests passed (18 regression + 5 new). Verified GET /api/streaks, POST /api/ai/weekly-letter (empty body + with note + no body), lifespan migration (clean startup, no deprecation warnings), custom recipe create/delete (is_custom=true), and no MongoDB _id leak across any endpoint. Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI integrations (motivation, reflect, meal, workout, weekly-letter) all return real content > 100 chars without fallback errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~576 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold; consider splitting models, routes (workouts/recipes/journal/events/life-goals), AI helpers, and seed/lifespan into separate modules before adding more features.

AI endpoints swallow exceptions and return 200 with fallback text + 'error' key — this hides real failures from clients; consider returning 502/503 on LLM failure, or at minimum a non-200 status when 'error' is populated so frontends can distinguish genuine content from fallback.

DELETE /api/recipes/{id} and DELETE /api/workouts/{id} / /api/events/{id} / /api/life-goals/{id} / /api/journal-entries/{id} all return 200 {ok:true} even when the id doesn't exist (no matched_count check). Consider returning 404 for missing resources for consistency with GET/PUT.
DELETE /api/recipes/{id} silently no-ops for seeded (non-custom) recipes — API surface gives no feedback; consider returning 403/404 with a message so UI can show 'Cannot delete seeded recipe'.

/api/streaks computes streaks by iterating days in Python from today backwards; if a user has logs for today but not yesterday, streak is 1 (correct), but there's no 'yesterday grace' — acceptable, just note in UX.
Weekly-letter prompt includes raw user reflection text truncated to 200 chars — fine, but consider sanitising / escaping to avoid prompt-injection via reflection field.
WeeklyLetterRequest body 'note' field is accepted but NEVER used in the prompt construction — either incorporate body.note into the prompt or drop the field.
seed_data_creation: Verified existing seed (recipes/quotes/podcasts/meditations/affirmations) populates idempotently via lifespan context manager. No new seed created. Tests create TEST_-prefixed workouts/recipes/logs/journal/events/goals and clean up after themselves.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py now has 23 tests covering all endpoints incl. new /api/streaks and /api/ai/weekly-letter. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Weekly-letter tests take ~20s each (Claude Sonnet 4.5). Note: body.note field in WeeklyLetterRequest is currently unused in the prompt — flagged in code review but not a test failure.
